description: Pluggable growth-mode slot for acquisition experiments, funnel instrumentation, and conversion optimization strategies.

fields.name: promptSource
fields.description: Relative path to the Markdown prompt source that drives this growth mode.

fields.name: trafficMode
fields.description: Whether the mode assumes live traffic, pre-launch traffic, or a synthetic test environment.

fields.name: experimentCadence
fields.description: How quickly the agent should ship, measure, and iterate growth experiments.

fields.name: outputMode
fields.description: The expected output shape, such as a ranked experiment slate or a conversion brief.

fields.name: funnelScope
fields.description: Which funnel stages this mode is expected to cover.

fields.name: channelFocus
fields.description: Acquisition and conversion surfaces the agent should prioritize.

fields.name: operatingRoles
fields.description: The internal specialist roles this mode should emulate, such as experimenter, analyst, and conversion.

fields.name: sourceTypes
fields.description: Preferred evidence sources for diagnosing and measuring growth opportunities.

fields.name: scoringAxes
fields.description: Criteria used to prioritize experiments and conversion changes.
